raw.official description: While Nemesis Form is active, eliminations extend the duration by 2 seconds. Half duration gained during Annihilation.
While Ravenous Vortex is airborne, use E again to detonate it, dealing 50 damage and pulling enemies downward.
raw.ability details:
* ''Integrated into base kit in Reign of Talon Season 2''
* Once detonated, the projectile falls straight down and creates a vortex at the location where it landed.
* Automatically detonates upon hitting the ground if the projectile has travelled at least 4 meters.

raw.official description: Transform into Nemesis Form, changing your attacks and gaining bonus armor.
raw.ability details: * Grants Ramattra [[armor]] and [[movement speed]] and replaces [[File:Void_Accelerator_Icon.png|middle|link=Ramattra#Void Accelerator|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ramattra#Void Accelerator|Void Accelerator]] and [[File:Void_Barrier_Icon.png|sub|link=Ramattra#Void Barrier|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ramattra#Void Barrier|Void Barrier]] with ''Could not find 'Pummel' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.'' and ''Could not find 'Block' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.''. * Cooldown starts when the transformation ends. * Nemesis Form is not interrupted by crowd control. * Ramattra can still use regular [[Quick Melee]] while in Nemesis Form. * Nemesis Form's [[movement speed]] buff does not count towards global movement speed buff cap.

abilities.name: Ravenous Vortex
shot_type: [[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

[[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile
[[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
raw.official description: Fire a sphere of energy that creates a slowing vortex on the ground, slowing and pulling down enemies. Re-activate to detonate early.
raw.damage:
15 (explosion damage)
70 over time
raw.ability keywords: area of effect;;cylindrical::armor piercing::barrier collide::travel time
raw.ability details: * Available to both forms. * The projectile must hit the ground to activate. * The projectile is blocked by [[barriers]], but the AoE is not. * The projectile bounces off of [[objects]] and walls, but passes through [[heroes]]. * The projectile can be negated by [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]], [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]], [[File:Abilities-sigma3.png|sub|link=Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|Kinetic Grasp]], [[File:Perk_PowerMatrix.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Power Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Power Matrix|Power Matrix]] and [[File:ULT Kekkai Sancturary.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|Kekkai Sanctuary]] and reflected by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]] before it lands. * Pulls down enemies lifted by Sigma's [[File:Abilities-sigma5.png|sub|link=Sigma#Gravitic Flux|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Gravitic Flux|Gravitic Flux]] and [[Wrecking Ball]] during [[File:Piledriver.png|sub|link=Wrecking Ball#Piledriver|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Wrecking Ball#Piledriver|Piledriver]], but does not prevent their effects. * Strangely, it appears that [[Doomfist]]'s [[Rocket Punch]] is not affected by the speed reduction. * Ravenous Vortex does not affect [[File:Petal_Platform_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Petal Platform|Petal Platform]].

raw.official description: Enter Nemesis Form and create a deadly swarm that lashes out at nearby enemies, persisting longer when damaging enemies.
raw.damage: 35 per second
raw.cast time:
0 + 0.5 seconds (Omnic form)
None (Nemesis form)
raw.ability details: * Transforms into Nemesis form until the Ultimate ends. ** If Annihilation is activated from Nemesis Form, it has no recovery time and Ramattra regains the armor bonus from entering Nemesis Form. ** The cooldown of Nemesis Form is not affected by Annihilation. If Annihilation is activated from Nemesis Form, Nemesis Form's cooldown immediately begins as Annihilation is activated. Making it possible to chain Nemesis Form into Annihilation into another Nemesis Form if Annihilation lasts longer than the cooldown of Nemesis Form. * Annihilation's tether damage by energy swarm is not interrupted by crowd control. * Timer ticks down at 85% reduced rate when any enemy Heroes are affected by Annihilation, resulting in a maximum duration of 20 seconds. ** Enemies must be within line of sight to be affected by Annihilation. ** Does not affect enemies through [[Barrier|barriers]], including [[Zarya]]'s [[File:Ability-zarya2.png|sub|link=Zarya#Particle Barrier|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zarya#Particle Barrier|Particle Barrier]] and [[File:Ability-zarya3.png|sub|link=Zarya#Projected Barrier|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zarya#Projected Barrier|Projected Barrier]], or terrain-like [[object]]s, like [[Mei]]'s [[File:Ability-mei3.png|sub|link=Mei#Ice Wall|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mei#Ice Wall|Ice Wall]]. ** Does not affect invulnerable enemies, like [[Zenyatta]] during [[File:Ability-zenyatta4.png|sub|link=Zenyatta#Transcendence|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zenyatta#Transcendence|Transcendence]]. ** [[File:Ability-ashe4.png|sub|link=Ashe#B.O.B.|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ashe#B.O.B.|B.O.B.]] counts as a valid target. Constructs, such as [[Symmetra]]'s [[File:Ability-symmetra2.png|sub|link=Symmetra#Sentry Turret|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Symmetra#Sentry Turret|Sentry Turrets]] and [[Torbjorn]]'s [[File:Ability-torbjorn3.png|sub|link=Torbjörn#Deploy Turret|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Torbjörn#Deploy Turret|Deploy Turret]], do not take damage. ** Does not affect [[Sombra]] while she is [[Stealth|invisible]], unless Ramattra enters her detection radius. * Can be canceled, by (re)activating Nemesis Form ability. This can be changed in settings.

raw.official description: Punch, creating a wave of piercing energy with every swing.
raw.fire rate: 1.67 shots/s
raw.ability details: * Damage per second: 108.33 * Exclusive to Nemesis form. * Punches pierce enemies and barriers. ** Also damages the barriers when passing through them. ** Damages enemies behind [[Zarya]]'s [[File:Ability-zarya2.png|sub|link=Zarya#Particle Barrier|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zarya#Particle Barrier|Particle Barrier]] and [[File:Ability-zarya3.png|sub|link=Zarya#Projected Barrier|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zarya#Projected Barrier|Projected Barrier]], but not the enemy affected by it. * Pummel is not reflected when blocked by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]]. * Does not damage enemies through terrain or terrain-like [[objects]], like [[Mei]]'s [[File:Ability-mei3.png|sub|link=Mei#Ice Wall|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mei#Ice Wall|Ice Wall]] or [[File:Tree_of_Life_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|Tree of Life]]. * Quick Melee cancels the recovery animation of Pummel.

* Exclusive to Omnic form.

fire_rate.raw: 25 shots/s

raw.official description: Significantly reduces damage taken from the front and reduces movement speed.
raw.ability details: * Exclusive to Nemesis form. * Cooldown starts when blocking is stopped. * No maximum duration; only limited by the duration of Nemesis Form. * Block is a [[channeled]] ability; the ability is interrupted when Ramattra is affected by [[stunned]], [[knocked down]] or [[hacked]], including subsidiary effects. ** The impact damage from the instance that applied the effect will still be blocked. * Damage is blocked if the horizontal angle between the direction Ramattra is facing and the direction from the impact location to its source is less than 53.15 degrees. ** Ramattra's vertical view angle does not affect blocking. * Effectiveness extends to area abilities and splash damage from projectiles. Damage is generally blocked when facing the center of the AoE. ** Damage from [[File:Ability-zarya4.png|sub|link=Zarya#Graviton Surge|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zarya#Graviton Surge|Graviton Surge]] and [[File:Ravenous_Vortex_Icon.png|sub|link=Ramattra#Ravenous Vortex|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ramattra#Ravenous Vortex|Ravenous Vortex]] is blocked by facing the hero that used it instead of the AoE center. ** Damage from [[File:Ability-hanzo4.png|sub|link=Hanzo#Dragonstrike|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Hanzo#Dragonstrike|Dragonstrike]] and [[File:Ability-torbjorn5.png|sub|link=Torbjörn#Molten Core|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Torbjörn#Molten Core|Molten Core]] is blocked regardless of facing direction. ** Does not reduce damage from [[Sombra]]'s [[File:Ability Sombra EMP.png|sub|link=Sombra#EMP|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sombra#EMP|EMP]] or Sigma's [[File:Abilities-sigma5.png|sub|link=Sigma#Gravitic Flux|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Gravitic Flux|Gravitic Flux]] (incl. both lift and slam). * Block mitigates delayed or triggered detonation damage from stuck projectiles and debuffs, regardless of the direction Ramattra is facing. ** Following abilities are affected: [[File:A-36_Icon.png|sub|link=Bastion#A-36 Tactical Grenade|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Bastion#A-36 Tactical Grenade|A-36 Tactical Grenade]], [[File:STICKY BOMBS.png|sub|link=Echo#Sticky Bombs|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Echo#Sticky Bombs|Sticky Bombs]], [[File:Ability-tracer4.png|sub|link=Tracer#Pulse Bomb|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Tracer#Pulse Bomb|Pulse Bomb]] and [[File:Captive_sun_icon.png|sub|link=Illari#Captive Sun|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Illari#Captive Sun|Captive Sun]]. * Does not affect [[damage over time]] effects from abilities. * Hides head hitbox from the front. * Block overrides the global 50% damage reduction buff cap.

raw.official description: Create a barrier at the targeted location.
raw.ability details: * Exclusive to Omnic form. * Hold to target. While targeting, a line on the floor is generated that shows the player where the barrier will be drawn when the button is released. ** Targeting can be canceled by pressing Primary Fire or Escape. ** Only one barrier can be active at a time. Creating a new one replaces the previous. *** A new barrier cannot be created near the location of an active Void Barrier. * Ability is stationed wherever it's placed. So, if placed on top of a temporary or moving surface, like [[File:Ability-mei3.png|sub|link=Mei#Ice Wall|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mei#Ice Wall|Ice Wall]] or the [[Payload]], it will remain in midair, even after the surface expires or moves. * Ability cooldown begins the moment the barrier is placed, similar to [[File:Ability-winston3.png|sub|link=Winston#Barrier Projector|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Winston#Barrier Projector|Barrier Projector]].
